approach: additive to aced: four new deterministic engine nodes (config-authoring/improve-skill rescuing the orphan skill + its validate engine, manage/list-skills, manage/repair-private, source into contribute/contribute-skill); no existing frozen aced scenario narrowed
capability-first placement (screaming architecture, user-approved): engines home by domain role not by their shared cyberplace CLI origin
these are deterministic .mts engines (node:test), wrong-squad for aced rubric judges -> SDD-default builder + impl-judge; only the improve-skill node's trigger/behavior is agent-config

cyberplace side is clean deletion: audit + skill commands are un-spec'd legacy, not covered by the cyberplace marketplace spec, so no narrowing/Clearance floor; still a cross-package edit held with the PR
ordering guard: aced gains local scripts + consumers rewired before cyberplace drops the commands, same PR, so no consumer breaks
reversible: feature branch, PR-flow; leash capped at auto-spec (self-assert spec gate only), deliver+handoff outward-facing held for user; hard floors (Clearance/Compatibility/Conflict) still stop

why: cold aced-spec-validator 3-lens {oracle,builder,architect} over 5 touched nodes — all PASS, CR-level ALIGNED, no blocking findings. 3 NEW config-authoring engine nodes: improve-skill (hybrid — @trigger 5-yes/4-near-miss balanced, 2 @quality @rubric well-formed, ported mechanical validate engine boolean-only), list-skills + repair-private-skills (deterministic, boolean-only, reached via manage; repair write-boundary pinned to .agents/skills by an observable Then). Additive to 2 frozen files self-cleared (no narrowing, no re-open): contribute-skill source-lookup ladder ×4 (maps 1:1 to source.test.ts), manage routing ×2. Root map + by-concept regenerated coherent; check-spec-structure clean. Two non-blocking wording fixes applied pre-freeze (Fit:split->partial(hybrid); list-skills three->four sources).
